Contact Us

Water & Environmental system

Inquiry Form

To Inquiry.

Personal data received from customers is encrypted and protected by SSL. You might not be able to use the inquiry form if your browser does not support SSL or if you access this website from a corporate network protected by a firewall.

Address

Toshiba Corporation
72-34, Horikawa-cho, Saiwai-ku, Kawasaki-shi, Kanagawa 212-8585, Japan

Before making an inquiry, please read the following.

By submitting your personal data, you agree to the following.

  • We will use your personal data for the purpose of responding to your inquiry.
  • Our group companies or third party contractors may use your personal data to the extent necessary to respond to your inquiry.
  • You can request us at any time to disclose, correct or delete any personal data on you that we have retained. Please contact the division indicated above.
  • You can choose not to disclose your personal data, but doing so may prevent us from responding to your inquiry.
  • Please read Privacy Policy and Terms and Conditions.
  • Children under 16 years old should provide personal data only after obtaining the consent of a parent or guardian.
  • For inquiries received on Saturdays, Sundays, or during company holidays, we will reply on the earliest working day.
